siteDescription: Cam Coulter is a writer and accessibility nerd, among other things. They work as a digital accessibility consultant, and they think incessantly about ethical technology, speculative fiction, and intentional community.
author: Cam Coulter

defaultImage.alt: A keyboard, a notebook, headphones, and a cup of coffee rest upon a wooden desk.
